title: 🔥估值优于上轮周期同期
body: 市场处于历史估值大底。MVRV 报 1.19，优于上轮周期同期（2022-08）的 1.03，且低于历史 81% 的时间。数据暗示当前筹码底部结构比上一轮同期更为扎实，尽管价格回调，但估值性价比已显著凸显。偏多。历史大底何时确认反转？
body_en: The market is sitting at a historic valuation bottom. MVRV stands at 1.19—beating the 1.03 from the same period in the last cycle (Aug '22) and lower than 81% of all history. Data implies a stronger bottom structure compared to the previous cycle. Despite the price pullback, the value proposition is screaming. Bullish bias. When will the historic bottom confirm the reversal?
